title: MCInspects
description: Counter-Strike style first person inspect animations in Minecraft. Inspect your tools and weapons.
body:
# MCInspects
You can take the player out of Counter-Strike, but you can't take the Counter-Strike out of the player. This mod adds a keybind (default 'R'), which when pressed makes the item in your hand flip around to be visible from more angles. 
# Features
Adds a button to play an inspect animation for the held item. That's it.
![Animation preview.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nUsMv8OS/images/c8dea9a70afcddf62eda0c64c184c19996dbf1d6.gif)

## Requirements:
- Fabric API.
- Undiagnosed ADHD (Optional).

### This mod is client-side only. Other players will see nothing.
